is this sugar level safe: I cannot diagnose, but generally a fasting blood sugar under 100 mg/dL and a post-meal level below 140 mg/dL are considered within a safe range. Please confirm your exact readings and any concerns with your clinician.
methods to control blood pressure: Common methods to help control blood pressure include reducing salt intake, eating a balanced diet, maintaining a healthy weight, exercising regularly, limiting alcohol, managing stress, and following your prescribed medication plan. Always coordinate changes with your doctor.
